# `/clear` Command
Clears items from player inventory.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/clear [player: target] [itemName: Item] [data: int] [maxCount: int]`

## Arguments
- `data`: int
- `itemName`: [Item](../enums/Item.md)
- `maxCount`: int
- `player`: target
